raw_consumer_statement:
Case number : XXXX In XXXX, I rented a vehicle from XXXX XXXX XXXX and encountered several maintenance issues, including low tire pressure, a cracked window, and a damaged back light. I promptly reported these problems to the company but received no assistance. Following further communication, I was advised by the XXXX office to return the vehicle for a resolution, with assurances that I would not incur any additional charges. 

Contrary to this assurance, I was later billed {$520.00} by XXXX for the issues previously reported. Despite numerous attempts to resolve this matter with XXXX and through my Citibank credit card, the charge has not been corrected. The ongoing dispute has prompted repeated and unwarranted debt collection calls, insisting that I owe this unjust charge. 

My efforts to contest this charge with Citibank have included multiple phone calls and the submission of photographic evidence, as requested by their representatives. However, there has been no satisfactory resolution, and the lack of support from Citibank in disputing this erroneous charge is concerning. This unresolved charge has not only affected my financial standing but has also restricted access to my Costco membership benefits linked to the Citibank card. 

I am seeking assistance from the CFPB to address this unresolved dispute with Citibank and XXXX, as my attempts to rectify this situation have been met with inadequate responses and further complications.
